summary: Clean the WorkbenchStore public facade after focused store extraction by removing duplicated private helper and mapper implementations.
rationale: WorkbenchStore is a red-zone BFF persistence boundary. This PR preserves the public facade and verifies public signatures while removing obsolete implementation helpers that now belong to focused store modules.
verification: uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_store_decoupling.py tests/test_workbench_auth_security.py tests/test_workbench_security_audit.py tests/test_workbench_api.py -q

uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_liepin_browser_session_probe.py tests/test_workbench_liepin_opencli_recovery.py tests/test_workbench_runtime_graph.py tests/test_workbench_runtime_owned_execution.py -q
uv run --group dev ruff check src/seektalent_ui tests/test_workbench_store_decoupling.py tests/test_workbench_auth_security.py tests/test_workbench_security_audit.py tests/test_workbench_api.py
uv run --group dev ty check src/seektalent_ui tests
